linkedin.text:
A leadership retreat inside a baroque palace costs less than a forgettable hotel ballroom in London. Most HR leaders don't believe that until we show them.

Last year we produced 3 days in Prague for 80 executives:
→ Welcome dinner in a 17th-century monastery cellar
→ Strategy workshop in a private castle overlooking the Vltava
→ Black-tie gala with a live string quartet under crystal chandeliers

Prague gives you what no conference room can: a sense of occasion. Every venue tells a story, and every story reinforces one message — your company invests in excellence.

Since 2010 we've produced 200+ events in 120+ countries, and Prague keeps over-delivering on budget.

📅 DM us and we'll send a sample Prague itinerary for your group size.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership #Prague
